comment.text: This key provides the text for a button that deletes a group. It appears within a dialog used to confirm the deletion of a group, likely within room management settings. Translators should ensure the text conveys the action of permanently removing a group.

usage.context:
</Text>
 </ModalDialog.Body>
 <ModalDialog.Footer>
 <Button
 key="DeleteButton"
 label={t("GroupingRooms:DeleteGroup")}
 size={ButtonSize.normal}
 primary
 scale
 onClick={onConfirmDelete}
 isLoading={isDeleting}
